m := 2;
n := 24;
g := 81;
F := Rationals();
R<u,v>:=PolynomialRing(F,2);

114256*u^17 - 73044*u^16 - 13552*u^15 - 8400*u^14 - 5268*u^13 - 1560*u^12 - 144*u^11)*v^7 - (84*u^32 - 3759*u^31 - 30527*u^30 - 64204*u^29 + 89880*u^28 + 622727*u^27 + 1039107*u^26 + 407947*u^25 - 997099*u^24 - 69167*u^28 - 49237*u^27 + 193387*u^26 + 544481*u^25 + 568593*u^24 + 153797*u^23 - 231490*u^22 - 265194*u^21 - 140190*u^20 - 65364*u^19 - 24103*u^18 + 7662*u^17 + 12776*u^16 + 4508*u^15 + 480*u^14 + 24*u^13)*v^5 - (126*u^30 - 707*u^29 - 11109*u^28 - 42993*u^27 - 71089*u^26 - 22807*u^25 + 109141*u^24 + 196784*u^23 + 145087*u^22 + 35534*u^21 - 16996*u^20 - 14737*u^19 - 7472*u^18 - 6050*u^17 - 3492*u^16 - 888*u^15 - 60*u^14)*v^4 + (84*u^29 + 68*u^28 - 2988*u^27 - 15257*u^26 - 34291*u^25 - 39509*u^24 - 16700*u^23 + 13571*u^22 + 21724*u^21 + 9865*u^20 - 788*u^19 - 2498*u^18 - 881*u^17 - 64*u^16 + 16*u^15)*v^3 - (36*u^28 + 161*u^27 - 134*u^26 - 2441*u^25 - 7329*u^24 - 11395*u^23 - 10324*u^22 - 5145*u^21 - 776*u^20 + 586*u^19 + 374*u^18 + 90*u^17 + 9*u^16)*v^2 + (9*u^27 + 60*u^26 + 144*u^25 + 78*u^24 - 336*u^23 - 882*u^22 - 1050*u^21 - 726*u^20 - 297*u^19 - 66*u^18 - 6*u^17)*v - u^26 - 8*u^25 - 28*u^24 - 56*u^23 - 70*u^22 - 56*u^21 - 28*u^20 - 8*u^19 - u^18;
q := (u+v+2)/(u-v);
t := (v-u)*(u+v)*(u+v+2)/(u^3+u^2*v+2*u^2+u*v^2+2*u*v+v^3+2*v^2-2);
E := [0,t^2-2*q*t-2,0,-(t^2-1)*(q*t+1)^2,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [(t+1)*(q*t+1),t*(q*t+1)*(t+1)];
